summary: Created+shipped MPI-161 — self-heal custom-node pip deps: re-run requirements.txt even when the node folder is already present (the recurring gguf-missing root cause). Fixed local (downloadManager.js: requirements outside the !alreadyExtracted guard) + Pod (app sends requirements_only for present nodes; wrapper _run_node_requirements_only pip-only branch). App committed; wrapper needs R2 republish.
Archived completed card during board cleanup.
